output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?rulerLabel ?titleLabel WHERE {
  ?ruler wdt:P39 wd:Q512196 .
  ?ruler rdfs:label ?rulerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?rulerLabel) = 'en')
  .
  wd:Q512196 rdfs:label ?titleLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?titleLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(?ruler IN(wd:Q157255 , wd:Q608876))
}
output.answer: The rulers of England during its republic (the Commonwealth of England, 1649–1660) were Oliver Cromwell and Richard Cromwell, both holding the title Lord Protector.
